rulings.Case Title: 250 KEARNY STREET, LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED VS. BRIDGETTA MAHLAR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Settlement Agreement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 9, 2015, line 4. PLAINTIFF 250 KEARNY STREET'S MOTION To Enforce Settlement Agreement is GRANTED, no opposition filed. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: YUE YUE, LLC VS. DAVID FIRESTONE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 9, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANT DAVID FIRESTONE'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to address missing portions of the lease. Motion is otherwise DENIED, verification is sufficient and request for damages is proper. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: YUE YUE, LLC VS. MICHAEL FRIDMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 9, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL FRIDMAN AND GALINA FRIDMANS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer based in use of the premises in violation of law. Parties' contract purporting to state that residential use was legal has no bearing on whether residential use of the premises was permitted by law. = (501/req)

rulings.Case Title: YUE YUE, LLC VS. MICHAEL FRIDMAN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, February 9, 2015, line 6. DEFENDANTS MICHAEL FRIDMAN AND GALINA FRIDMAN MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is DENIED. Verification is sufficient and request for damages is proper. = (501/req)
